question.ask:
ets_th2 What kind of airplane does Lily think will be popular in the future?
(Big and safe airplanes. / Cheap and safe airplanes. / Small and fast airplanes.)

info.value:
M: Hi, Lily! Do you know who invented the first airplane?

W: Yes! It was invented by the Wright Brothers.

M: When was it invented, do you know?

W: It was invented in 1903 in America.

M: What kind of airplanes do you think will be popular in the future?

W: I think small, fast airplanes for personal trips will be popular.
